title: Progress through full in-game phase lifecycle to game over
description: Verifies a leader can run a complete game by progressing through all phases from role generation to game over and returning to the lobby at the end.

steps.description: Navigate to /leader/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Create a new room with a valid room name, a valid max players value, and a valid display PIN
Add enough players to meet the minimum player requirement using the leader UI
Start the game
Proceed through phases until the game reaches the game over state
Verify the game over state is displayed with a winner result
Verify the leader can return to the session lobby after the game ends

title: Player joins a leader room and appears in the leader lobby grid
description: Verifies a player can join via room code with a name and is reflected in the leader lobby player grid with a join confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /leader/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Create a new room with valid settings and note the room code shown by the leader UI
Navigate to /join/[roomCode] using the noted room code
Fill a unique player name into the player name field
Submit the join request
Verify a join confirmation is displayed for the player
Verify the player appears in the leader lobby player grid

title: Connect display using room code or PIN and show live game state
description: Verifies the display screen can join a room using a room code or PIN and shows the current player list and game state.

steps.description: Navigate to /leader/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Create a new room with valid settings and note the room code and display PIN shown by the leader UI
Navigate to /display
Enter the room code or display PIN to connect to the room
Verify player cards are displayed on the display screen
Verify the current game state is displayed on the display screen

title: Display updates during day voting and morning recap sequencing
description: Verifies the display reflects real-time updates for voting results and shows morning recap reveals in sequence as the leader progresses.

steps.description: Navigate to /leader/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Create a new room with valid settings and note the room code and display PIN shown by the leader UI
Navigate to /display
Enter the room code or display PIN to connect to the room
Return to the leader UI and add enough players to meet the minimum player requirement
Start the game and advance phases until day voting is active
Record votes and end voting
Advance phases until morning recap is active and step through recap reveals
Verify the display shows voting results during the voting flow
Verify the display shows morning recap reveals progressing in sequence

title: Collect votes and advance into justification
description: Verifies the leader can run day voting, collect votes from players, and proceed into the justification phase for an accused player.

steps.description: Navigate to /leader/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Create a new room with valid settings
Add enough players to meet the minimum player requirement using the leader UI
Start the game and advance through setup phases until day voting is active
Use the leader UI to record votes for multiple players
End voting and proceed to the next phase
Verify the justification phase is displayed for an accused player

title: Assign roles and advance from role generation to role binding
description: Verifies the leader can generate roles, assign/bind roles to players, and advance the game into the next phase.

steps.description: Navigate to /leader/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Create a new room with valid settings
Add enough players to meet the minimum player requirement using the leader UI
Start the game
Proceed to the role generation phase
Assign roles to players to complete role binding
Verify the game advances past role binding into the day gameplay flow

title: Run night actions and view sequential morning recap reveals
description: Verifies the leader can progress from night actions into morning recap and observe reveals presented in a sequence.

steps.description: Navigate to /leader/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Create a new room with valid settings
Add enough players to meet the minimum player requirement using the leader UI
Start the game and advance phases until night is active
Execute required night actions using the leader UI
Proceed to morning recap
Advance through the morning recap reveal steps
Verify morning recap reveals can be stepped through and the recap completes into the next phase

title: Admin can log in successfully
description: Verifies an admin can log in with valid credentials and land on the admin dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the admin dashboard

title: Log in as leader and land on the leader dashboard
description: This test verifies a leader can log in with valid credentials and is taken to the leader dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /leader/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the leader dashboard

title: Operate timed speaker queue during day discussion
description: Verifies the leader can run day discussion by starting the speaker queue and advancing speakers with the timer operating.

steps.description: Navigate to /leader/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Create a new room with valid settings
Add enough players to meet the minimum player requirement using the leader UI
Start the game and advance through setup phases until day discussion is active
Start the speaker queue timer
Advance to the next speaker in the queue
Verify the day discussion speaker queue shows a current speaker and progresses when advanced

title: Create a paid booking for an activity from the activities area
description: Verifies an admin can create a paid booking for an activity and the new booking appears in the bookings list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to view activities
Click the control to create a new booking
Select an activity from the activity dropdown
Fill Booking Paid User into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone number field
Set a valid people count
Set a valid payment amount
Mark the booking as paid
Submit the booking form
Verify the new booking appears in the bookings list

title: Block game start when fewer than minimum players are present
description: Verifies the leader cannot start the game until the minimum number of players are in the room and a validation state is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /leader/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Create a new room with valid settings
Add fewer than the minimum required players using the leader UI
Attempt to start the game
Verify a start-game validation error is visible indicating more players are required

title: Create an activity with location, offers, pricing, and description
description: Verifies an admin can create a new activity with required details and see it appear in the activities list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to manage activities
Start creating a new activity
Select a valid date and time for the activity
Select a location from the location dropdown
Toggle at least one available location offer
Fill a valid base price into the base price field
Fill a description into the description field
Submit the activity form
Verify the new activity is displayed in the activities list

title: Create a location with offers and see it in the locations list
description: This test verifies an admin can create a new location with at least one offer/package and the new location appears in the locations list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to locations management
Click the action to add a new location
Fill "Harbor Venue" into the location name field
Add a new offer/package to the location
Fill "Standard Package" into the offer name field
Submit the location form
Verify the locations list contains "Harbor Venue"

title: Add a staff member with roles and see them in the staff list
description: Verifies an admin can create a staff member with assigned roles and the staff member appears in the staff list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to view staff management
Click the control to add a new staff member
Fill Staff Create User into the staff name field
Fill staff.create.user@example.com into the staff email field
Assign at least one role to the staff member
Submit the staff form
Verify the new staff member appears in the staff list

title: Route tied votes into day tiebreaker phase
description: Verifies that when voting results tie, the game proceeds into the day tiebreaker phase rather than moving directly to night.

steps.description: Navigate to /leader/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Create a new room with valid settings
Add enough players to meet the minimum player requirement using the leader UI
Start the game and advance through setup phases until day voting is active
Record votes to create a tie between at least two candidates
End voting and proceed to the next phase
Verify the day tiebreaker phase is displayed

title: Edit an existing booking and see it updated in the list
description: Verifies an admin can edit a booking and the updated booking details are reflected in the bookings list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to view activities
Click the control to create a new booking
Select an activity from the activity dropdown
Fill Booking Edit User into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone number field
Set a valid people count
Mark the booking as free
Submit the booking form
Click the navigation item to view bookings management
Select the booking created in this test from the bookings list
Edit the people count to a different valid value
Submit the booking form
Verify the booking entry in the list reflects the updated details

title: Return to lobby and exclude players for the next game
description: Verifies the leader can finish a game, return to the lobby, and exclude at least one player from participating in the next game.

steps.description: Navigate to /leader/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Create a new room with valid settings
Add enough players to meet the minimum player requirement using the leader UI
Start the game and progress until the game over state
Return to the session lobby
Exclude one player from the next game using the lobby controls
Verify the excluded player is marked as not participating for the next game

title: Edit an existing activity and see updates in the list
description: Verifies an admin can edit an activity and see the updated details reflected in the activities list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to manage activities
Start creating a new activity
Select a valid date and time for the activity
Select a location from the location dropdown
Fill 25 into the base price field
Fill EditTest Activity into the description field
Submit the activity form
Open the activity actions for the created activity
Choose to edit the activity
Fill 30 into the base price field
Submit the activity form
Verify the updated activity is displayed in the activities list

title: Show error when joining with an invalid or expired room code
description: Verifies the join page shows an error state when the room code does not correspond to an active room.

steps.description: Navigate to /join/[roomCode] using a syntactically valid but non-existent room code
Fill a player name into the player name field
Submit the join request
Verify an invalid or expired room code error is visible

title: Navigate from home to leader area
description: Verifies a visitor can navigate from the landing page to the leader area and is taken to the leader login or leader dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the leader interface navigation option
Verify the leader login page or the leader dashboard is displayed

title: View activity details with financials, tables, linked room, and location info
description: Verifies an admin can open an activity and see financial charts, a linked game room section, bookings and costs tables, and location information displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to view activities
Click an activity card to open its details
Toggle the bookings table section
Toggle the costs table section
Verify the financial summary donut chart and attendance distribution chart are displayed
Verify the linked game room section and location information are displayed

title: Edit an existing location and see updates reflected in the list
description: This test verifies an admin can edit a location’s details and the updated values are reflected in the locations list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to locations management
Click the action to add a new location
Fill "Old Town Hall" into the location name field
Submit the location form
Select the location "Old Town Hall" from the list
Edit the location name field to "New Town Hall"
Submit the location changes
Verify the locations list contains "New Town Hall"

title: Use match replay without affecting the current live room state
description: Verifies the display can open match replay controls to view a past match and then return to live view without changing the live state shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /leader/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Create a new room with valid settings and note the room code and display PIN shown by the leader UI
Navigate to /display
Enter the room code or display PIN to connect to the room
Open the match replay viewer from the display UI
Select a past match from the replay list
Exit replay mode to return to the live room view
Verify replay controls are usable for a past match
Verify the display returns to showing the live room state after exiting replay mode

title: Navigate from home to admin login
description: Verifies a visitor can navigate from the landing page to the admin panel and is taken to the admin login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the admin panel navigation option
Verify the admin login page is displayed

title: Create a free booking for an activity
description: Verifies an admin can create a free booking and the booking appears with a free/unpaid status in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to view activities
Click the control to create a new booking
Select an activity from the activity dropdown
Fill Booking Free User into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone number field
Set a valid people count
Mark the booking as free
Submit the booking form
Verify the new booking appears in the bookings list
Verify the booking shows a free or unpaid status indicator

title: Delete a location after confirming deletion
description: This test verifies an admin can delete a location by confirming the deletion and the location is removed from the locations list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to locations management
Click the action to add a new location
Fill "Temp Location" into the location name field
Submit the location form
Select the location "Temp Location" from the list
Click the delete action for the selected location
Confirm the deletion
Verify the locations list does not contain "Temp Location"

title: Unlink a game room from an activity
description: Verifies an admin can unlink a linked game room from an activity and the linked room is no longer shown on the activity details page.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to view activities
Click an activity card to open its details
Click the control to unlink the linked game room
Verify the linked game room is no longer displayed for the activity

title: Edit a staff member and see updates reflected in the list
description: Verifies an admin can edit a staff member’s details and the updated information is shown in the staff list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to view staff management
Click the control to add a new staff member
Fill Staff Edit User into the staff name field
Fill staff.edit.user@example.com into the staff email field
Assign at least one role to the staff member
Submit the staff form
Select the staff member created in this test from the staff list
Edit the staff name to Staff Edited User
Submit the staff form
Verify the staff list shows the updated staff member name

title: Handle invalid display room code or PIN with user-visible error
description: Verifies the display shows an error state when a user attempts to connect with an invalid room code or PIN.

steps.description: Navigate to /display
Enter an invalid room code or PIN
Submit the connect action
Verify an invalid room code or PIN error is visible

title: Delete an activity after confirmation
description: Verifies an admin can delete an activity via the confirmation flow and it is removed from the activities list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to manage activities
Start creating a new activity
Select a valid date and time for the activity
Select a location from the location dropdown
Fill 20 into the base price field
Fill DeleteMe Activity into the description field
Submit the activity form
Open the activity actions for the created activity
Choose to delete the activity
Confirm deletion
Verify the deleted activity is no longer displayed in the activities list

title: Delete a booking from bookings management
description: Verifies an admin can delete a booking after confirming and the booking is removed from the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to view activities
Click the control to create a new booking
Select an activity from the activity dropdown
Fill Booking Delete User into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone number field
Set a valid people count
Mark the booking as paid
Submit the booking form
Click the navigation item to view bookings management
Select the booking created in this test from the bookings list
Click the delete booking control
Confirm deletion
Verify the deleted booking no longer appears in the bookings list

title: Prevent join submission when player name is empty
description: Verifies the join page enforces required player name entry and shows a validation error when submitted empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /leader/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Create a new room with valid settings and note the room code shown by the leader UI
Navigate to /join/[roomCode] using the noted room code
Submit the join request without entering a player name
Verify a required-field validation error is visible for the player name

title: Edit a location to add an additional offer and preserve existing offers
description: This test verifies an admin can add an additional offer while editing a location and the offers remain associated after saving.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to locations management
Click the action to add a new location
Fill "Offer Test Venue" into the location name field
Add a new offer/package to the location
Fill "Base Offer" into the offer name field
Submit the location form
Select the location "Offer Test Venue" from the list
Add another new offer/package to the location
Fill "Add-on Offer" into the offer name field
Submit the location changes
Verify the location details show offers including "Base Offer" and "Add-on Offer"

title: Lock an activity from its details page
description: Verifies an admin can lock an activity and the UI reflects that the activity is locked.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to view activities
Click an activity card to open its details
Click the lock activity control
Verify the activity is marked as locked

title: Delete a staff member after confirmation
description: Verifies an admin can delete a staff member with confirmation and the staff member is removed from the staff list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to view staff management
Click the control to add a new staff member
Fill Staff Delete User into the staff name field
Fill staff.delete.user@example.com into the staff email field
Assign at least one role to the staff member
Submit the staff form
Select the staff member created in this test from the staff list
Click the delete staff member control
Confirm deletion
Verify the deleted staff member no longer appears in the staff list

title: Validate required fields when creating a booking
description: Verifies the booking form prevents submission with missing required fields and shows validation errors.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to view activities
Click the control to create a new booking
Submit the booking form without filling required fields
Verify required-field validation errors are visible

title: Activity form required-field validation prevents submission
description: Verifies an admin cannot submit an activity with missing required fields and sees validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to manage activities
Start creating a new activity
Leave at least one required field empty
Submit the activity form
Verify a required-field validation error is displayed

title: Cancel location deletion to keep the location
description: This test verifies an admin can cancel a delete confirmation and the location remains in the locations list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to locations management
Click the action to add a new location
Fill "Do Not Delete" into the location name field
Submit the location form
Select the location "Do Not Delete" from the list
Click the delete action for the selected location
Cancel the deletion confirmation
Verify the locations list contains "Do Not Delete"

title: Admin sees error on invalid credentials
description: Verifies an admin attempting to log in with invalid credentials sees an authentication error and is not logged in.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill invalid-username into the username field
Fill invalid-password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify a login error is displayed

title: Show an error for invalid leader credentials
description: This test verifies a leader sees an invalid-credentials error when submitting incorrect login details.

steps.description: Navigate to /leader/login
Fill "invalid_user" into the username field
Fill "invalid_password" into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible
Verify the user remains on the leader login page
